:root {
  --mv-accent: #C84B3F;
  --mv-accent-dark: #A33A30;
  --mv-accent-ink: #6E2A22;
  --mv-accent-soft: #FBEDEB;
  --mv-ink: #0A0A0A;
  --mv-ink-2: #525252;
  --mv-ink-3: #9A9A9A;
  --mv-line: #E5E5E5;
  --mv-line-soft: #F0F0F0;
  --mv-surface: #FFFFFF;
  --mv-shell: #FAFAFA;
  --mv-font: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, "Arimo", "Liberation Sans",
             Arial, sans-serif;
}

.sb-show-main, .docs-story, .sbdocs.sbdocs-wrapper,
.sbdocs.sbdocs-content {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

/* Marketing-site layout: break out of the Storybook docs container.
   .sbdocs-content has an inherent max-width and centred padding that makes
   the page feel narrow and Storybook-y. Strip those on the Introduction
   page so the hero and nav can occupy the full viewport. */
/* These rules are now handled globally in preview-head.html via [data-page-type="intro"] */

/* Full-bleed wrapper used by the hero + top nav. Negative-margin trick to
   escape any constrained parent: pull each edge out as far as it needs to,
   occupy 100vw, and reset that on inner content with auto margins below. */
.mv-bleed {
  width: 100vw;
  margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw);
  margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw);
}

/* Hero — full-bleed red block, reverse-out display type, asterisk mark.
   The Swiss-poster move: a single saturated red rectangle does the
   visual lifting, type lands big and white over it. */
.mv-hero {
  position: relative;
  background: var(--mv-accent);
  color: #ffffff;
  overflow: hidden;
  isolation: isolate;
  margin-bottom: 64px;
}
.mv-hero-inner {
  position: relative;
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 96px 32px 96px;
}
.mv-hero-asterisk {
  position: absolute;
  top: 32px;
  right: 32px;
  fill: #ffffff;
  display: block;
  opacity: 0.85;
}
/* Hero logo — sits in the top-right of the hero block (replacing the old
   asterisk slot). Sized generously so the brand is the first thing readers
   pick up before the headline. */
.mv-hero-logo {
  position: absolute;
  top: 40px;
  right: 40px;
  height: 500px;
  width: auto;
  display: block;
  /* The logo PNG is on its native colour over transparency. If consumers
     want it forced to white on the red hero, uncomment the next line —
     it tints any opaque pixels to white via a CSS filter. */
  /* filter: brightness(0) invert(1); */
}
@media screen and (max-width: 860px) {
  .mv-hero-logo { height: 72px; top: 24px; right: 24px; }
}
/* All hero text uses !important to defeat Storybook's .sbdocs p / .sbdocs
   span rules (which set their own colour with higher specificity). */
.mv-hero, .mv-hero * { color: #ffffff !important; }
.mv-hero-meta {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 36px;
}
.mv-hero-bullet {
  margin-right: 12px;
  font-size: 12px;
}
.mv-hero-meta-right {
  margin-left: auto;
  opacity: 0.9;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.mv-title {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: clamp(56px, 9vw, 96px);
  line-height: 0.95;
  margin: 0 0 24px;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.mv-tagline {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  max-width: 680px;
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 20px;
  line-height: 1.5;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin: 0 0 40px;
}
.mv-cta {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.mv-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 12px 22px;
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.005em;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: background 0.14s ease, color 0.14s ease, border-color 0.14s ease;
}
.mv-btn-primary {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--mv-accent) !important;
  border: 1px solid #ffffff;
}
.mv-hero .mv-btn-primary,
.mv-hero .mv-btn-primary * {
  color: var(--mv-accent) !important;
}
.mv-btn-primary:hover {
  background: var(--mv-ink);
  color: #ffffff !important;
  border-color: var(--mv-ink);
}
.mv-hero .mv-btn-primary:hover,
.mv-hero .mv-btn-primary:hover * {
  color: #ffffff !important;
}
.mv-btn-ghost {
  background: transparent;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
}
.mv-btn-ghost:hover {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
  border-color: #ffffff;
}

/* Constrain non-hero content to a centred 1200px column so the page reads
   as a proper layout instead of stretching across a huge monitor. */
[data-page-type="intro"] .sbdocs .mv-section-head,
[data-page-type="intro"] .sbdocs .mv-lead,
[data-page-type="intro"] .sbdocs .mv-grid,
[data-page-type="intro"] .sbdocs .mv-cols,
[data-page-type="intro"] .sbdocs .mv-note,
[data-page-type="intro"] .sbdocs > p,
[data-page-type="intro"] .sbdocs > pre,
[data-page-type="intro"] .sbdocs > .css-iaorlw {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  padding-left: 32px;
  padding-right: 32px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.mv-section-head {
  margin-top: 36px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}
.mv-section-head .mv-h2 { margin: 0; }

.mv-h2 {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 28px;
  color: var(--mv-ink);
  letter-spacing: -0.025em;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.1;
}
.mv-h3 {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 14px;
  margin: 0 0 10px;
  color: var(--mv-ink);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: -0.005em;
}
.mv-lead {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  color: var(--mv-ink-2);
  margin: 0 0 28px;
  max-width: 680px;
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.mv-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 64px;
}
/* ─── Chart / Example cards — Swiss Federal two-column grid ─────────────
   Left column: chart name as poster headline (bold, dominant).
   Right column: one-line description + arrow.
   Hairline divider between columns. Gold cap on top; on hover the cap
   splits into a half-red / half-gold gradient that breathes. */
.mv-card {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 2fr 3fr;
  border-radius: 0;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10);
  border-top: 3px solid #F0C040;
  background: var(--mv-accent);
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: transform 0.14s ease, box-shadow 0.14s ease;
  min-height: 90px;
}
.mv-card-left {
  padding: 14px 14px 14px 16px;
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.13);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}
.mv-card-right {
  padding: 14px 16px 14px 14px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 8px;
  background: #ffffff;
  transition: background 0.2s ease;
}
.mv-card:hover .mv-card-right {
  background: #F0C040;
}
.mv-card:hover {
  border-top-color: transparent;
  /* 300%-wide gradient so we can scroll it with background-position */
  background:
    linear-gradient(var(--mv-accent), var(--mv-accent)) padding-box,
    linear-gradient(
      90deg,
      var(--mv-accent) 0%,
      #F0C040       33%,
      var(--mv-accent) 66%,
      #F0C040       100%
    ) border-box;
  background-size: auto, 300% 100%;
  animation: mv-card-breathe 2.2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.mv-card-title {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin: 0;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.mv-card-text {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.58;
  color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  transition: color 0.2s ease;
}
.mv-card:hover .mv-card-text {
  color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.72);
}
.mv-card-arrow {
  align-self: flex-end;
  line-height: 1;
  color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22);
  transform-origin: center;
  transition: color 0.2s ease;
}
.mv-card:hover .mv-card-arrow {
  color: var(--mv-accent);
  animation: mv-breathe 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.mv-cols {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 32px;
  margin-bottom: 56px;
}
.mv-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.mv-col p {
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  color: var(--mv-ink-2);
  margin: 0 0 12px;
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.mv-note {
  margin: 12px 0 64px;
  padding: 22px 24px;
  background: var(--mv-accent-soft);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--mv-accent);
  font-family: var(--mv-font);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--mv-ink);
}
.mv-note code {
  background: var(--mv-surface);
  border: 1px solid var(--mv-line);
  padding: 1px 6px;
  font-size: 12.5px;
}

/* MDX bare-code & inline-code on this page, so they match the page font. */
.sbdocs .mv-hero ~ * code,
.sbdocs .mv-cols code { font-family: "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; }

@media screen and (max-width: 860px) {
  .mv-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .mv-cols { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .mv-title { font-size: 48px; }
  .mv-hero-inner { padding: 40px 24px 48px; }
  .mv-hero .mv-hero-meta-right { display: none; }
}

/* Hero bullet breathing star */
.mv-hero-bullet--breathe {
  display: inline-block;
  animation: mv-breathe-intro 3.2s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: center;
}
@keyframes mv-breathe-intro {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 0.55; transform: scale(1); }
  50%       { opacity: 1;    transform: scale(1.14); }
}
/* Card hover: border gradient sweeps left→right + lift pulse */
@keyframes mv-card-breathe {
  0%, 100% {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(200, 75, 63, 0.35), 0 0 0 0   rgba(240, 192, 64, 0);
    background-position: 0 0, 0% 0;
  }
  50% {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(200, 75, 63, 0.50), 0 0 0 3px rgba(240, 192, 64, 0.22);
    background-position: 0 0, 100% 0;
  }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .mv-hero-bullet--breathe { animation: none; }
  .mv-card:hover { animation: none; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(200, 75, 63, 0.35); }
}
`
    })]
  });
}
